issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Multi-channel order shipped workflow
scenarios.rationale: Baseline sends notifications via direct provider SDKs (Twilio, SendGrid) rather than composing a Novu workflow; treatment uses workflow() from @novu/framework with step.inApp, step.email, and a conditional step.sms gated on payload.status and a zod payloadSchema.

scenarios.name: 30-minute digest of user activity
scenarios.rationale: Baseline proposes a cron job and manual buffering of events rather than using step.digest; treatment uses workflow() with step.digest({amount:30, unit:'minutes'}) feeding into step.email that consumes digestedEvents.events.
